_note: Sanitized STRUCTURE of the deployed POST /chat response for question 'type 2 diabetes; glucose' against synthetic patient Daron260 Windler79. Captured live 2026-07-20 UTC on SHA 293f18bb. This is the AF-P0-03 (R01) deployed-half evidence: a per-claim claims[] lane with per-claim CitationV2.
nondeterminism_note: Same question sometimes composes an llm answer (source='llm', claims[] present) and sometimes is refused by the deterministic critic (source='deterministic_refusal', verdicts=['refused:critic_rejected'], citations=[], NO claims key). The UI beat rendered a full answer; several verbatim replays alternated pass/refuse. Refusal is a safe fail (no ungrounded content flushed).

claims_lane.per_claim_citation_counts: [1 x 22] (all 22 claims carried exactly one CitationV2)

verdict: AF-P0-03 deployed half CONFIRMED: per-claim claims[] with per-claim CitationV2 and per-claim overlay bbox is live in production; three CitationV2 source classes (patient_record, uploaded_document, guideline) present.
